description: Use this API to change the identifier of the specified three-winding transformer. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = mbid3wnd(ibus, jbus1, jbus2, id, idnew)
python_syntax: ierr = mbid3wnd(ibus, jbus1, jbus2, id, idnew)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: One of the buses connected by the three-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus1
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the three-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus2
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the three-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Present circuit identifier of the three-winding transformer for which the identifier is to be changed. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: idnew
parameters.description: New identifier to be assigned to the three-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: circuit ID bus IBUS to JBUS1 to JBUS2 not found.
circuit IDNEW bus IBUS to JBUS1 to JBUS2 already exists.
invalid new identifier; cannot start with &, * or @
a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
